payload:
# Grid View for pai

## Objective

Add a new "Grid" page — a masonry layout of cards showing all app activity (chats, research, briefings, memories, tasks, knowledge), newest first. Drag to rearrange, filter by type, click to navigate. Purely frontend — no backend changes.

## Context

Full spec: `docs/plans/grid-view.md`

All work is in `packages/ui/`. Data comes from 6 existing APIs fetched in parallel. Card positions persisted to localStorage.

## Requirements

### 1. New files to create
... [truncated, 3934 chars total]

task-1772787932-b560: Install @dnd-kit deps (core, sortable, utilities) and create packages/ui/src/hooks/use-grid-feed.ts. Hook fetches 6 APIs in parallel via useQueries (threads, jobs with status=done+type=research, inbox/all, beliefs, tasks, knowledge/sources), normalizes each into GridCard type {id, type, title, preview, timestamp, navigateTo}, sorts desc by timestamp, manages filter state (filters + setFilters). Export GridCard type and useGridFeed from hooks/index.ts. Follow existing hook patterns (queryKey objects, TanStack Query). Card types: chat, research, briefing, memory, task, knowledge.
task-1772787932-b560: Installed @dnd-kit deps, created use-grid-feed.ts hook with GridCard type. Typecheck clean, 833 tests pass. Commit 936837e.

task: task-1772787940-5a47 — Create GridCard.tsx and Grid.tsx. The hook use-grid-feed.ts already exists. Create packages/ui/src/components/GridCard.tsx (card component with type icons, colored labels, relative timestamps, preview truncation, click-to-navigate, hover lift, size variants by type) and packages/ui/src/pages/Grid.tsx (filter bar with pill toggles, masonry layout using @dnd-kit/core + @dnd-kit/sortable, responsive 2-4 columns, drag-to-rearrange with localStorage persistence at key pai-grid-order, pin support). Use bg-card, border-border/40, existing shadcn/ui components, theme tokens only. Read existing components (e.g. Layout.tsx, InboxPage, JobsPage) for styling patterns before writing. CRITICAL: After implementation and commit, you MUST run all quality gates and include evidence in build.done payload: tests: pass, lint: pass, typecheck: pass, audit: pass, coverage: pass, complexity: <score>, duplication: pass. Run: pnpm --filter @personal-ai/ui exec tsc --noEmit, pnpm lint, pnpm test, pnpm build. Report each result.
task: task-1772787940-5a47, commit: eb57cce, tests: pass (833/833), lint: pass, typecheck: pass, build: pass, files: GridCard.tsx + Grid.tsx created

task: task-1772787940-5a47 — VERIFY ONLY, code already committed at eb57cce. GridCard.tsx and Grid.tsx already exist. Run ALL quality gates and emit build.done with COMPLETE evidence. Required gates: (1) pnpm --filter @personal-ai/ui exec tsc --noEmit (2) pnpm lint (3) pnpm test (4) pnpm build (5) pnpm audit --audit-level=moderate || true (6) pnpm run test:coverage || true. Include ALL results in build.done payload: tests: <result>, lint: <result>, typecheck: <result>, build: <result>, audit: <result>, coverage: <result>. Do NOT modify any code — just verify and report.
task: task-1772787940-5a47, commit: eb57cce, tests: 833 passed (48 files), lint: clean, typecheck: clean, build: success, audit: 20 pre-existing vulns (not related), coverage: thresholds passed

task: task-1772787945-82cd — Wire Grid page routing. Three changes:

1. App.tsx: Add 'import Grid from ./pages/Grid' after the Jobs import (line 24). Add route '<Route path="/grid" element={<ErrorBoundary><Grid /></ErrorBoundary>} />' after the /chat route (between chat and memory routes).

2. Layout.tsx: Add an IconGrid function (4x4 grid icon using SVG rect elements, same pattern as other icons). Add { to: '/grid', label: 'Grid', icon: IconGrid } to navItems array between Inbox and Chat (index 1).

3. MobileTabBar.tsx: Add a TabIconGrid function (same 4x4 grid SVG). Add { to: '/grid', label: 'Grid', icon: TabIconGrid } to moreTabs array (first position, before Knowledge).

Quality gates required: typecheck (pnpm --filter @personal-ai/ui exec tsc --noEmit), lint (pnpm lint), tests (pnpm test — expect 833 pass), build (pnpm build). Commit with message: 'feat(ui): wire Grid page routing in App.tsx, Layout.tsx, and MobileTabBar'
task: task-1772787945-82cd, commit: 74a56d6, files: App.tsx Layout.tsx MobileTabBar.tsx, typecheck: pass, lint: pass, tests: 833 pass, build: pass

task: task-1772787950-6a9c — Build verification. Run pnpm build and pnpm test. No code changes needed — this is verify-only. Report results in build.done with evidence for: typecheck, lint, tests, build, audit, coverage. All 4 Grid commits (936837e, eb57cce, 74a56d6) are already in place.
typecheck: pass, lint: pass, tests: 833 passed (48 files), build: pass, audit: 20 pre-existing vulns (not ours), coverage: thresholds pass. All 4 Grid View tasks verified complete.

Grid View feature complete. All 4 tasks closed. 3 new files (use-grid-feed.ts, GridCard.tsx, Grid.tsx), 3 modified files (App.tsx, Layout.tsx, MobileTabBar.tsx). Commits: 936837e, eb57cce, 74a56d6. All gates pass: 833 tests, typecheck clean, build success.
